title: Burning Bridgettes
description: A hard-hitting crime drama starring Bridgette like you’ve never seen her before… as twins! It has cool cars and even cooler Bridgettes. They kick the bad guys’ butts. There are speed boat chases, nuclear Armageddons, and puppies wrestling each other while wearing tiny overalls.
altHero: Bridgette, a small blonde child, dressed as a cop in front of flames
alt1: detective Bridgette taking down a thief as cop Bridgette arrives
alt3: Bridgettes being approached by two huge criminals
alt4: detective Bridgette kicking a criminal in the face
